name: Week 9 Legs — Recovery Deload (Seated/Supported Only)
description: Post-QL-spasm legs day. SKIP everything that lit it up: back extensions, DB lunges, Smith Bulgarians, heavy squats. Keep light maintenance squat + seated/supported machine work. Add butterfly/frog stretch as cooldown (per W9 planning notes). This is the lightest legs day of the program on purpose.

exercises.notes: Full depth, slow. Find where the hips are tight and breathe into it.
Big slow circles. Wake up the hip stabilizers gently.
Extra spine mobility — don't skip this week

55/side x8 x3 (drop from 75-80). The 'keep squatting at least 1x/week' rule — even on recovery weeks. Deep, slow, controlled. This is maintenance, NOT progression. If the back twinges at all, rack it and skip the rest of squat work.

3 plates/side (drop from 4), medium ROM — NOT the full-depth 4-plate version from W8. The deep 4-plate version is what's been hammering the hip stabilizers. Medium ROM this week, stay in the strong part of the range.
90 at the new settings (5 m 0 1). W8D5 confirmed 90 as warmup/calibration, 110 as working. Stay at 90 this week — hamstrings don't need the stimulus, we're recovering. Fully seated = QL-safe.
3 plates/side x20, single leg. No plate under foot this week — skip the deeper stretch progression, save it for W10 when the back is quiet.
90 seconds. The 'adductor stretch slot' from W9 planning — replaces the ad-hoc adductor machine experiment. Sit, soles together, hinge forward, breathe. Feels great after deep squats.
60s each side. Deep hip flexor release — directly addresses what's been fried. The longer you hold, the more the QL/psoas lets go.

tips: RECOVERY WEEK — SKIPPING: back extensions (hidden fatigue driver), DB lunges (QL re-lighter), Smith Bulgarians (QL re-lighter).
Squat 55/side maintenance — the one rule is 'always keep squatting', even on recovery.
Leg press 3 plates medium ROM. The 4-plate full-ROM version is what's been hammering hip stabilizers.
Seated leg curl 90 (warmup weight) — don't push to 110 this week.
Butterfly stretch + pigeon as cooldown — this is where the adductor stretch slot lives now (no machine needed).
If the back twinges at ANY point, stop the session. The whole point of this week is to not re-anger it.
W10 target: ease back to W8 loads IF recovery held. Don't make up lost progression.
